hero.title: The agent that grows with you
hero.description: Lydia Agent is your companion for code, creativity, and controlled chaos. Inspired by Alice's world and the dark hearts hiding secrets.

featurePreview.title: Lives everywhere, remembers everything.
featurePreview.description: From terminal to desktop, Lydia runs tasks, keeps memory, and integrates with your favorite tools.

featuresGrid.title: Bewitched by productivity
featuresGrid.subtitle: Each Astro island hydrates only what it needs, with animations that don't break the spell.

features.persistentMemoryDesc: Lydia stores facts, preferences, and project context using memory skills and structured notes.
features.webBrowseDesc: Open sites, extract data, interact with forms, and verify results in real time.
features.creativeDesc: Generate ASCII art, diagrams, music, copy, and code with a style of its own.
features.scheduledDesc: Create cron jobs, reminders, and pipelines that keep running while you rest.
features.sandboxDesc: Each subagent works in an isolated context to avoid conflicts and risks.
features.astroIslandsDesc: Selective hydration: animations and interactivity live only where they are needed.
features.cliDesc: Control the entire agent from the terminal with a consistent and fast command set.
features.integrationsDesc: Connect Telegram, Discord, email, smart home, GitHub and more through skills.
features.contextualDesc: Maintains multi-turn context across sessions so answers feel continuous and aware.
features.audioDesc: Text-to-speech, voice memos, music generation and audio analysis out of the box.
features.visualDesc: Generate images, diagrams, ASCII art and polished web artifacts on demand.
features.codeDesc: Write, review, refactor and test code across multiple languages and frameworks.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Learn how to install, configure and extend Lydia Agent.
